Subject: Invoice #2024-089 — Meridian Coffee Brand Identity

Hi,

Please find attached Invoice #2024-089 for $4,200 for the completed brand identity work on the Meridian Coffee project. Payment is due April 11, 2026.

Sarah Chen
Vertex Design Co

Subject: Re: Harborview Restaurant — Logo Revisions

Hi,

Thank you for the updated logo files. We have reviewed them and have two minor revision requests before final approval:
1. Slightly increase the font weight on the wordmark
2. Try a warmer tone on the amber color

Please send revised files by March 20.

Regards,
Marcus Webb
Harborview Restaurant Group

Subject: Contract Signed — Thornfield Bakery Rebrand

Hi,

Excited to confirm that the contract for the Thornfield Bakery full rebrand has been signed. Project kickoff is scheduled for March 25, 2026. Budget is $12,500 as discussed.

Looking forward to working together!

Elena Thornfield
Thornfield Bakery
